title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
abstract: why use many token when few token do trick - Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens with smart auto-fallback.
abstract_zh: 能用少Token何须多用？一个Claude Code技能，让AI用原始语说话，减少65%的Token消耗！结合RTK堆叠压缩可节省15-95% Token，支持智能自动回退。Token不够用？这是你的省钱利器。
